oci_image_standards.description: OCI image building skill covering base images, multi-stage builds, version pinning, .dockerignore, multi-platform builds, and OCI labels.

oci_security.description: OCI runtime security skill covering capability dropping, read-only filesystems, image signing (Cosign), SBOMs (Syft), and Trivy vulnerability scanning.
